purpose: Git-inspired memory system for logging corrections and decisions. Keeps context lean.

design.inspiration: Git object model — index files are lightweight, full objects loaded on demand
design.core_principle: Never load all history. Load only what is relevant to current working files.

files.HEAD: Plain text. Lists active mistake and decision IDs for current session. Regenerated by 'ucgen context'.
files.mistakes.idx: Tab-separated. One line per mistake: id TAB file TAB summary TAB recurrence TAB status
files.decisions.idx: Tab-separated. One line per decision: id TAB summary TAB date TAB status
files.CONVENTIONS: Plain text append-only log. Graduated rules from mistakes. One rule per line with date prefix.
files.mistakes/M-NNN.json: Full mistake object. Loaded only when relevant file is being worked on.
files.decisions/D-NNN.json: Full decision object. Loaded from decisions.idx reference.
files.mistakes/archive/: Moved here by ucgen gc. Never in context window.

mistake_object_schema.git_commit: str | null — short hash from git log -1
mistake_object_schema.recurrence_count: int — incremented when same mistake logged again

decision_object_schema.do_not_suggest: str — what Cursor should never propose

gc_rules.graduation_action: Append to CONVENTIONS file. Remove from mistakes.idx. Delete M-NNN.json.

cursor_instruction: Read HEAD first. Load only the listed mistake and decision objects. Always load CONVENTIONS in full — it is kept small by gc.

initial_state.HEAD: # CURRENT — empty on fresh install. Run: ucgen context
initial_state.CONVENTIONS:
# Conventions graduated from mistakes log
# Format: [YYYY-MM-DD] Graduated from M-NNN (recurrence:N): rule
